summary: Iteration 25 - Major UI/UX overhaul testing complete. All features verified working: Register/Login pages have NO footer, Register has 3-step progress bar with SIRET mandatory, ThemeToggle in admin sidebar, Landing page header z-index 1000, hero pt-140px, Footer simplified without Offres column, BarcodeScanner has CONFIRMER SCAN + rescan buttons, i18n files (FR/PL/ES) exist.

Register step 1 has progress bar 'Étape 1/3' - PASS
Register shows 'Continuer →' button for Transporteur - PASS
Register shows '30 jours d'essai gratuit' text - PASS
Register has Transporteur role button (data-testid='register-role-admin') - PASS
Login page at /login has NO footer (just demo text below) - PASS
Login works (admin@transporter-pro.com / admin123) - PASS
Admin dashboard shows ThemeToggle (data-testid='theme-toggle') - PASS
ThemeToggle is clickable and toggles - PASS
Landing page header has high z-index (banner: 1000, nav: 999) - PASS
Landing page hero has sufficient padding (pt-140px) - PASS
Landing page footer has no 'Offres' column - PASS
Landing page footer has Mentions Légales link - PASS
Landing page footer has Tarifs link - PASS
Landing page footer has Contact link - PASS
BarcodeScanner has CONFIRMER SCAN button (data-testid='confirm-scan-btn') in code - PASS
BarcodeScanner has rescan button (data-testid='rescan-btn') in code - PASS
BarcodeScanner modal opens and closes correctly - PASS
Backend GET /api/verify-siret/12345678900012 returns valid response - PASS
Backend GET /api/verify-siret/123 returns invalid (not 14 digits) - PASS
Backend GET /api/subscription/plans returns solo monthly_price=19 - PASS
i18n files exist: fr.json, pl.json, es.json - PASS
ThemeContext and I18nProvider are in App.js - PASS
Driver dashboard regression (driver@test.com / driver123) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: AuthPages.jsx correctly implements NO footer on both login and register pages
Register page has 3-step progress bar with SIRET mandatory verification in step 2
BarcodeScanner.jsx has scannedCode state, green success UI, CONFIRMER SCAN + rescan buttons
Footer.jsx simplified - no Offres column, just Mentions Légales, Tarifs, Contact links
LandingPage.jsx has z-[1000] on banner, z-[999] on nav, pt-[140px] on hero
ThemeContext.jsx properly implements dark/light toggle with localStorage persistence
I18nProvider in App.js wraps the app with FR/PL/ES translations
ThemeToggle placed in admin sidebar next to logout button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified Batch 3 features: 1) AuthPages.jsx completely rewritten - login and register pages have NO footer, register has 3-step form with SIRET mandatory verification via API Sirene. 2) BarcodeScanner.jsx has scannedCode state, green success border, CONFIRMER SCAN + rescan buttons (only visible after successful scan - camera not available in headless). 3) Landing page fixed: z-[1000] on banner, z-[999] on nav, pt-[140px] on hero. Footer simplified without Offres column. 4) ThemeContext + I18nProvider added to App.js. ThemeToggle in admin sidebar next to logout button. i18n files for FR/PL/ES exist.

mocked_apis.note: Camera access unavailable in headless browser (expected behavior for BarcodeScanner)
